title: Character Creation
readAloud:
Now that we have met the players...

It is time to meet the heroes.

Tonight we create the characters that will step into this world.

Some will be brave.
Some will be clever.
Some will be chaotic.

And knowing this group...

Some will probably make decisions that even I could never predict.

That is the magic of D&D.

A character is more than numbers on a sheet.

Their strength is not just how hard they can swing a sword.

Their intelligence is not just how many spells they know.

Their story is what matters.

Who are they?
Where did they come from?
What do they fear?
What would they risk everything to protect?

Tonight these blank pages become heroes.

Heroes with dreams.
Heroes with flaws.
Heroes with secrets.

And heroes whose choices will shape the world around them.

So let's create the Bean Rounders.
